summary: Regression after follow-up changes (imageio-ffmpeg, persistent storage, 50MB cap, startup prune, custom delete modal). Backend: 10/10 pytest tests pass — all original 8 + 2 new (server-constants check confirming MAX_DIRECT_DOWNLOAD_BYTES=52428800, STORAGE_DIR=/app/backend/storage/conversions, FFMPEG_BIN exists; and physical-file location check confirming MP3 lands in persistent dir). Regression on TestConvertFlow.test_convert_direct_audio now also asserts duration>0 (new ffmpeg-stderr probe works — kozco piano2.wav returns duration≈6.18s) and title contains 'piano2'. POST /api/convert validation (empty→400, non-http→400), GET /api/conversions list (no _id leak), GET /api/file/{id} streams audio/mpeg + Content-Disposition attachment with valid MP3 framing, DELETE removes both DB row and disk file (subsequent GET→404, list excludes id). Frontend (Expo web @ 390x844): app loads with brand label + headline; pasting https://www.kozco.com/tech/piano2.wav + tapping convert-button takes ~6s, player-modal opens automatically with art, title 'PIANO2', WWW.KOZCO.COM · 0:06 meta, transport controls and SAVE TO FILES button visible. New custom delete confirmation modal works: tap delete-item-0 → confirm-delete-modal appears with track title; CANCEL (confirm-cancel) closes modal and keeps the row; DELETE (confirm-delete) fires DELETE /api/conversions/{id} (verified 200 in network log) and the row is removed from history (empty-state 'NO TRACKS YET' renders). This is a clean fix for the iteration_1 web-Alert.alert noop issue.

react_native_issues.issue: Still emits 'TouchableWithoutFeedback is deprecated. Please use Pressable.' Cosmetic only — non-blocking.
'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' warning (from reanimated internals). Library-level, not actionable in app code.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Migrate root TouchableWithoutFeedback → Pressable to silence the deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') uses deprecated FastAPI hooks — works but emits DeprecationWarning. Consider migrating to lifespan context manager.
server.py: re/shutil/mimetypes imported at top but shutil and mimetypes are unused — minor cleanup.
server.py: STORAGE_DIR.mkdir runs at import time which is fine, but unit-testing the module via import (TestServerConstants) creates the dir as a side-effect — acceptable here, just noting.
index.tsx still ~840 lines — consider extracting PlayerModal, DeleteConfirmModal, HistoryRow into their own files to stay under the 700-line guideline.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_mp3_converter.py (added duration>0/title assertions and TestServerConstants class for 50MB cap + STORAGE_DIR + ffmpeg-bin regression)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all requested flows (convert, player-open, save-button visible, delete-cancel, delete-confirm)

seed_data_creation: None persistent. Tests create and tear down their own TEST_/UUID conversions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite covers happy-path conversion via direct URL, validation, list/get/delete, persistence to /app/backend/storage/conversions, 50MB cap constants, and ffmpeg-binary resolution. Use https://www.kozco.com/tech/piano2.wav as the canonical fast sample (≈149KB → ~6s mp3). Frontend custom delete confirmation modal works on react-native-web — tap delete-item-{idx} surfaces confirm-delete-modal with confirm-cancel / confirm-delete testIDs; this replaces the Alert.alert path that was a noop on web in iteration_1.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no defects found. The iteration_1 delete-from-web issue (Alert.alert noop on react-native-web) was resolved by replacing it with a controlled Modal containing two TouchableOpacity confirm buttons; verified end-to-end via network log capture (DELETE /api/conversions/{id} → 200) and UI state transition to empty-state.
